summary: Completed comprehensive testing of 9 Trade Monitor page enhancements. All features verified working correctly through both backend API tests (9/9 passed) and frontend UI tests via Playwright.
passed_tests: Feature 1: LOT Size card displays correct value from Profit Tracker (balance ÷ 980) ✓ - Shows 14.71
Feature 2: Projected Exit Value card displays LOT × multiplier calculation ✓ - Shows $220.65
Feature 3: Exit Value Calculator popup opens and calculates custom LOT values ✓ - LOT 10 × 15 = $150.00
Feature 4: Philippine Time is displayed prominently in Your Time card ✓ - Shows 06:38:15 (Asia/Manila)
Feature 5a: User local time appears smaller underneath (if not Philippines timezone) ✓ - Shows 14:38:15 (America/Los_Angeles)
Feature 5b: Profit multiplier (×15) is visible next to trading signal in banner ✓
Feature 5c: User local time (10:20 PM) is visible next to trading signal in banner ✓
Feature 6: 'Projected Total' removed from Today's Summary ✓ - Only shows Actual Total and P/L Difference
Feature 7: 'Enter the Trade Now!' button text is correct ✓
Feature 8: Celebration popup shows after entering actual profit ✓ - Shows 'Incredible trade! Well done! 🚀'
Feature 9a: Today's Summary shows only Actual Total ($250.22) and P/L Difference (+$29.42) ✓
Feature 9b: Encouragement message in Today's Summary ✓ - '🎉 Great job! You're exceeding targets today!'
Forward to Profit Tracker button works in celebration popup ✓ - Toast shows 'Trade profit forwarded to Profit Tracker!'

tests: test_profit_summary_for_lot_size - Returns account_value for LOT calculation ✓
test_trade_log_endpoint - Creates trade with performance calculation ✓
test_create_signal_with_profit_points - Creates signal with custom multiplier ✓

critical_code_review_comments: All 9 Trade Monitor enhancements implemented correctly in TradeMonitorPage.jsx
Projected Exit Value (LOT × multiplier) calculation working
Exit Value Calculator popup functional with custom LOT input
Philippine Time prioritized in Your Time card with user local time underneath
Signal banner shows user local time and profit multiplier (×15)
Today's Summary simplified to only Actual Total and P/L Difference
'Enter the Trade Now!' button text correct (changed from 'Exit Now!')
Celebration popup shows as Dialog after submitting actual profit
Forward to Profit Tracker button works correctly
seed_data_creation: Created test trades during testing (TEST_ prefixed)
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 9 Trade Monitor enhancements fully tested and working. Key features: 1) LOT Size card shows balance/980, 2) Projected Exit Value shows LOT×multiplier, 3) Exit Calculator popup works, 4) Philippine time prioritized, 5) User local time and multiplier in signal banner, 6) Projected Total removed from Today's Summary, 7) Button text is 'Enter the Trade Now!', 8) Celebration popup shows after profit entry, 9) Today's Summary shows only Actual Total and P/L Difference with encouragement. Trade flow tested: Check In → Alert → End Trade → Enter Profit → Celebration → Forward to Profit Tracker.
